query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, a.tipoArquivo, a.direcao,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedimentos WHERE arquivoId = a.id) as total_procs
FROM arquivos a 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%demonstrativo%' OR a.nome LIKE '%0282629%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, a.tipoArquivo, a.direcao,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedimentos WHERE arquivoId = a.id) as total_procs
